title: WeatherForecast
description: Adds a toggleable HUD overlay showing current weather and time until the next weather change.
body:
**WeatherForecast**

A lightweight client-side mod that displays a small HUD overlay with the current in-game weather status and an estimated time until it changes.
## Features

- Detects and displays Clear, Rain, and Thunderstorm weather
- Shows time remaining until the next weather change
- Toggle the HUD on/off with [H] — rebindable in Controls settings
- Color-coded text and icon for each weather type
- Semi-transparent background panel for readability

Notes

- Client-side only — no server-side installation required.
- If it doesn't work properly, please create a new world.

All my mods are completely free to use.
If you'd like to support development, consider buying me a coffee!
☕ https://ko-fi.com/nekozame_garo
